results.snippet:
39. Get Sean to score 10 real conversations as ground truth calibration. Gap between Sean's scores 
and judge scores = contamination measurement.  [Technical Architecture]

⚠

 REQUIRES SEAN'S DIRECT INPUT

40. Build meta-judge whose only job is evaluating whether judges are improving — tracking if judge 
scores become more predictive of real-world outcomes over time.  [Technical Architecture]
41. Implement real-world outcome correlation: connect Coliseum scores to Bland AI call outcomes. If 
high Coliseum score + low conversion = scoring system is broken.  [Technical Architecture]
42. Implement 24/7 continuous recalibration: every real call outcome feeds back into scoring model. 
Judges evo
